title: promotionCoupons — E2E: Apply Returned CouponCode in Cart

operations.label: setup_coupons
setup_prod
operations.query: query { products(storeId: "B2B-store" currencyCode: "USD" first: 1 filter: "category.subtree:fc596540864a41bf8ab78734ee7353a3 price.USD:(0 TO) inStock_variations:true") { items { id } } }

operations.label: add_item
operations.query: mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "B2B-store" userId: "user-acme-store-maintainer-1" productId: "60a67fe6-f418-488a-b685-45353c07973c" quantity: 1 }) { id discountTotal { amount } } }

operations.label: apply_coupon

assertions.raw: [ERRORS label=apply_coupon] errors[] empty — coupon applied without server error
assertions.label: apply_coupon

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] data.addCoupon.coupons[] contains an entry with code = {{COUPON_CODE}} AND isAppliedSuccessfully = true (BL-CART-003)
crossLayerChecks.note: data.addCoupon.coupons[] contains an entry with code = {{COUPON_CODE}} AND isAppliedSuccessfully = true (BL-CART-003)
crossLayerChecks.resolved: data.addCoupon.coupons[] contains an entry with code = E2E-COUPON AND isAppliedSuccessfully = true (BL-CART-003)

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] data.addCoupon.discountTotal.amount > 0 — coupon produced a real discount (BL-PRICE-001)
crossLayerChecks.note: data.addCoupon.discountTotal.amount > 0 — coupon produced a real discount (BL-PRICE-001)
crossLayerChecks.resolved: data.addCoupon.discountTotal.amount > 0 — coupon produced a real discount (BL-PRICE-001)

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] data.addCoupon.total.amount = data.addCoupon.subTotal.amount - data.addCoupon.discountTotal.amount (± shipping/tax) — math consistency
crossLayerChecks.note: data.addCoupon.total.amount = data.addCoupon.subTotal.amount - data.addCoupon.discountTotal.amount (± shipping/tax) — math consistency
crossLayerChecks.resolved: data.addCoupon.total.amount = data.addCoupon.subTotal.amount - data.addCoupon.discountTotal.amount (± shipping/tax) — math consistency

cleanup: [GQL-OP cleanup_clear] mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: \"{{STORE_ID}}\" userId: \"user-acme-store-maintainer-1\" }) { id } } [GQL-EXEC cleanup_clear]
